creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
I forgot to mention, the conflicts line is too broad and would make the
software conflict with itself.

Since in the ports tree there is only one conflicting piece of software
in lang/sdcc-devel I'd suggest the following conflicts line:

CONFLICTS=      sdcc-3.1.*

Thanks again and sorry for the double email.

-- 
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
